title: Junior Product Marketing Manager
description: IntroductionJoin us as Junior Product Marketing Manager on our existing and upcoming games!At Twin Harbour Interactive we strive to develop high-quality strategy games and make them accessible for all players around the world. In our eyes game development is a promise for fun and entertainment – that’s what we live and aim for!We’re Human FirstWe believe that great teams are built on trust, respect, and good humor. From game nights to casual drinks, quiz nights, and karaoke, we don’t just work together – we connect, play, and support each other like a true crew.Join Twin Harbour Interactive Where Strategy Meets Vision.Twin Harbour Interactive is a global strategy game powerhouse, shaping the future of long-term multiplayer gaming. With offices in Hamburg and Malta, we design strategy games that bring people together – across borders and generations.Whether you’re an expert tactician or an imaginative world-builder, there’s a place here for you to grow, thrive, and leave your mark.Your tasksAs the Junior Product Marketing Manager, your mission is to support the execution and scaling of product marketing initiatives across our portfolio, with a strong focus on player-facing messaging, app store presence, and live feature communication.You will play a hands-on role in shaping how our games show up in the app stores and at key product moments, ensuring clear, consistent, and impactful messaging across Store In-App Events, feature launches, and live-ops beats.You will own Store In-App Events end-to-end and support broader go-to-market execution in close collaboration with Product, Publishing, Growth, and Creative teams.This role reports to the Head of Product Marketing.YOUR MISSIONStore In-App Events OwnershipOwn the end-to-end execution of Store In-App Events across platforms (Apple App Store & Google Play)Plan, create, and publish Store In-App Events aligned with product updates, live-ops beats, and promotionsPartner with Product, Live Ops, and Creative teams to define messaging, timing, and visual requirementsEnsure Store In-App Events reflect product priorities, player motivations, and seasonal beatsTrack performance and extract learnings to improve visibility, engagement, and conversion continuouslyGTM & Launch SupportSupport GTM execution for features, live-ops events, and content updatesPrepare briefs, timelines, checklists, and internal documentation for launchesEnsure messaging is consistently applied across store, UA, and community touchpointsCoordinate inputs and approvals across cross-functional teamsSupport launch retrospectives and documentation of best practicesMessaging & Brand Consistency SupportApply approved messaging frameworks, narratives, and brand guidelines across executionsSupport copywriting and adaptation of player-facing messaging for store and product beatsHelp maintain internal documentation for product positioning, personas, and narrativesFlag inconsistencies or execution risks early to the Head of Product MarketingInsights, Performance & LearningMonitor the performance of Store In-App Events and key beatsSupport post-launch analysis and documentation of learnings and best practicesWork with Analytics and Growth teams to understand key KPIs and performance driversHelp turn insights into actionable recommendations for future campaignsWhat Success Looks LikeStore In-App Events are consistently executed on time, on brief, and with clear performance visibilityProduct updates and live-ops beats are clearly and compellingly communicated to playersProduct Marketing is seen as a reliable execution partner by Product and Publishing teamsMessaging quality and consistency improve across store and product touchpointsYou build a strong foundation to grow into a full Product Marketing Manager roleYOUR BACKSTORYMust-Have1–2 years of experience in Product Marketing, Marketing, Publishing, or a related role (gaming preferred)Strong interest in mobile games, live-ops, and player behaviorBasic understanding of app stores and mobile game ecosystemsComfortable working with multiple stakeholders and deadlinesHighly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable in executionStrong written communication skills with a player-first mindsetWillingness to learn and grow into a broader Product Marketing roleNice-to-HaveExperience with mobile F2P gamesBasic familiarity with ASO, Store In-App Events, or UA conceptsExperience working with tools like Google Workspace, Excel, Confluence, or JiraInterest in brand, positioning, and player psychologyWe offerWhy You'll Love Working With Us A Global Team, A Shared PurposeOur strength lies in our diversity. With over 30 nationalities represented across our two locations, we’re united by a shared passion for strategy games and a bold vision for the future. We celebrate what makes each of us unique – our perspectives, our stories, and the paths that led us here.Work Your WayWhether you're crafting code from a harbor-view desk in Hamburg or fine-tuning design details under the Maltese sun, we support flexible hybrid work models that empower you to do your best work – wherever you are.Grow With UsAt Twin Harbour, your journey matters. Our Career Path Framework and mentorship culture provide the clarity and feedback you need to take the next step – whether you’re deepening your expertise or branching into new disciplines. We invest in your growth with language courses, e-learning platforms, and support for conferences and training.GehaltNeugierig auf das Gehalt für diesen Job?Gehalt anzeigenChart iconMin €Max €Stillfront Supremacy GmbH
